== Notes for [[Item:Q52640|Q52640]] ==

{geni:about_me} http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/index.html
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/anena.html</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D585AF51EFBBFC9A22EF79916B33B8

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
